nasb.text: When He began His ministry, Jesus Himself was about thirty years of age, being, as was supposed, the son of Joseph, the son of Eli,

esv.text: Jesus, when he began his ministry, was about thirty years of age, being the son (as was supposed) of Joseph, the son of Heli,

cnv.text: 耶穌開始傳道，年約三十歲，人以為他是約瑟的兒子，約瑟是希里的兒子，

ccb.text: 耶稣开始传道的时候，年纪约三十岁，照人的看法， 祂是约瑟的儿子， 约瑟是希里的儿子，

csbs.text: 耶稣开始传道的时候，大约三十岁。照人看来， 他是约瑟的儿子，约瑟是希里的儿子，
